revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:7-ngie̍t 7-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:7月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 7일]][[zh-classical:七月初七]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初七]][[zh:七月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:7-ngie̍t 7-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:7月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 7일]][[zh-classical:七月初七]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初七]][[zh:七月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:7-ngie̍t 7-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:7月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 7일]][[zh-classical:七月初七]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初七]][[zh:七月初七]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 7 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:7-ngie̍t 7-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:7月7日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 7일]][[zh-classical:七月初七]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 7 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初七]][[zh:七月初七]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 7|qq=July 7}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月初七|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 7일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 7''' is the 7th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 10 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 27|en|July 27|qid=Q2719|lt=July 27|1=July 27}} , {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} ) – The {{ill|Taikō kenchi|ja|太閤検地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taikō kenchi|1=Taikō kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8193888}} began, as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} , then known as Hashiba Hideyoshi, conducted the first land survey in {{ill|Ōmi Province|en|Ōmi Province|qid=Q843882|lt=Ōmi Province|1=Ōmi Province}} . * Year 16 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}} , {{ill|1588|en|1588|qid=Q6757|lt=1588|1=1588}} ) – The {{ill|Sword Hunt|ja|刀狩令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sword Hunt|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 刀狩|1=Sword hunt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1133763}} edict was issued by Hideyoshi, confiscating swords and firearms from farmers. The {{ill|Kaizoku Kinshirei|ja|海上賊船禁止令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaizoku Kinshirei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 海賊停止令|1=Anti-Piracy Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11559227}} was also enacted, prohibiting piracy and private naval forces. * Year 16 of {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 6|en|August 6|qid=Q2787|lt=August 6|1=August 6}} , {{ill|1639|en|1639|qid=Q6897|lt=1639|1=1639}} ) – A library, later known as the {{ill|Momijiyama Bunko|ja|紅葉山文庫|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Momijiyama Bunko|1=Momijiyama Bunko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11605272}} , was established within {{ill|Edo Castle|en|Edo Castle|qid=Q865913|lt=Edo Castle|1=Edo Castle}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 5|en|August 5|qid=Q2783|lt=August 5|1=August 5}} , {{ill|1783|en|1783|qid=Q7745|lt=1783|1=1783}} ) – The {{ill|Tenmei eruption|en|Tenmei eruption|qid=Q106959236|lt=Tenmei eruption|1=Tenmei eruption}} of {{ill|Mount Asama|en|Mount Asama|qid=Q242730|lt=Mount Asama|1=Mount Asama}} occurred, contributing to the {{ill|Great Tenmei famine|en|Great Tenmei famine|qid=Q9030108|lt=Tenmei famine|1=Great Tenmei famine}} . * Year 5 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}} , {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} established the {{ill|Gaikoku bugyō|en|Gaikoku bugyō|qid=Q81986|lt=Gaikoku Bugyō|1=Gaikoku bugyō}} , overseeing foreign affairs. * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|qid=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}} , {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} ) – The Meiji government reorganized its administration, establishing the {{ill|Department of Divinities|en|Department of Divinities|qid=Q2264720|lt=Department of Divinities|1=Department of Divinities}} and {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|qid=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan|1=Daijō-kan}} , as well as the {{ill|Ministry of Popular Affairs|en|Ministry of Popular Affairs|qid=Q4388365|lt=Ministry of Popular Affairs|1=Ministry of Popular Affairs}} , {{ill|Ministry of Finance (Japan)|ja|大蔵省|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ministry of Finance (Japan)|1=Ministry of the Treasury|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q910073}} , {{ill|Ministry of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|en|Ministry of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|qid=Q222241|lt=Ministry of Foreign Affairs (Japan)|1=Ministry of Foreign Affairs (Japan)}} , {{ill|Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)|en|Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)|qid=Q3276048|lt=Ministry of War|1=Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)}} , {{ill|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|en|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|qid=Q6867320|lt=Ministry of Justice|1=Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)}} , and {{ill|Ministry of the Imperial Household|en|Ministry of the Imperial Household|qid=Q8193428|lt=Ministry of the Imperial Household|1=Ministry of the Imperial Household}} . * Year 2 of Meiji (Gregorian calendar August 15, 1869) – The {{ill|Hokkaidō Development Commission|en|Hokkaidō Development Commission|qid=Q524428|lt=Hokkaidō Development Commission|1=Hokkaidō Development Commission}} was established in {{ill|Ezo|1=Emishi|2=ja|3=蝦夷|ja|Ezo地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ezo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q932574}} .
== Births == * Year 1 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 25|en|August 25|qid=Q2819|lt=August 25|1=August 25}} , {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} ) – {{ill|Yamada Bimyō|en|Yamada Bimyō|qid=Q1072569|lt=Yamada Bimyō|1=Yamada Bimyō}} , novelist and linguist (d. {{ill|1910|en|1910|qid=Q2075|lt=1910|1=1910}} )
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Angen|en|Angen|qid=Q1193287|lt=Angen|1=Angen}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}} , {{ill|1176|en|1176|qid=Q19693|lt=1176|1=1176}} ) – {{ill|Taira no Shigeko|ja|平滋子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Shigeko|1=Taira no Shigeko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11061157}} (Kenshunmon-in), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (b. {{ill|1142|en|1142|qid=Q19614|lt=1142|1=1142}} ) * Year 18 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 7|en|August 7|qid=Q2781|lt=August 7|1=August 7}} , {{ill|1590|en|1590|qid=Q6764|lt=1590|1=1590}} ) – {{ill|Mibu Yoshio|ja|壬生義雄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mibu Yoshio|1=Mibu Yoshitake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11429515}} , retainer of the {{ill|Utsunomiya clan|ja|宇都宮氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya clan|1=Utsunomiya clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11449780}} (b. {{ill|1552|en|1552|qid=Q6565|lt=1552|1=1552}} ) * Year 7 of [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 22|en|August 22|qid=Q2828|lt=August 22|1=August 22}} , {{ill|1795|en|1795|qid=Q7815|lt=1795|1=1795}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Shigeyoshi|en|Tokugawa Shigeyoshi|qid=Q3530495|lt=Tokugawa Shigeyasu|1=Tokugawa Shigeyoshi}} , first head of the {{ill|Shimizu-Tokugawa family|ja|清水徳川家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shimizu-Tokugawa family|1=Shimizu House|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11560958}} (b. {{ill|1745|en|1745|qid=Q7586|lt=1745|1=1745}} )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|6|7|8|6|7|8|7|0707|qq=}}
